name: Old World Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
----------------------
Sift the cake flour, sugar, cocoa, instant coffee, baking soda, and salt together in a large mixing bowl.
Add the shortening, 2/3 cup of buttermilk, and vanilla extract. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed for 2 minutes.
Add the remaining 1/3 cup of buttermilk and eggs. Beat at medium speed for an additional 2 minutes.
Pour batter into two greased 8-inch round cake pans.
Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes or until cakes are done when tested with a toothpick.
Cool the cakes in the pans on racks for 10 minutes, then remove and completely cool before serving.
SWEETENED WHIPPED CREAM:
Chill mixing bowl and beaters.
Place cream, sugar, and vanilla extract in chilled bowl.
Beat with an electric mixer at high speed until soft peaks form and mixture is of a spreading consistency.
Do not overbeat (or you will create butter).
